$comment: The curated official-source links for the link-only readiness items. Voyalier's stated posture is that it never asserts entry/health rules and only points at official sources — so these URLs are the product guarantee, and they were maintained by hand in two languages (voyalier-core::readiness and mock.ts) with nothing tying them together. The core's only test on them checked that they start with https. voyalier-core's parity_readiness_links_match_the_contract holds Rust to this file; mock.ts imports it.

entry_requirements.label: UK FCDO travel advice — entry requirements by country
US State Dept — travel advisories by country

health_notices.label: US CDC — Travelers' Health, destination notices
